facts.text: Max is a 3-year-old male Labrador Retriever weighing 28 kg
Chief complaint: Acute vomiting since yesterday evening
Vomited 5 times in the last 24 hours, partially digested food
Decreased appetite, not eating breakfast this morning
No known toxin exposure, no recent diet changes
Temperature: 38.9°C (102°F), Heart Rate: 110 bpm, Respiratory Rate: 24/min
Physical exam: Mild abdominal discomfort on palpation, otherwise normal

vetNotes.treatmentPlan: Supportive care: NPO for 12 hours, then bland diet. Maropitant 1mg/kg SC for antiemetic. Monitor for 24h, recheck if vomiting continues.

soapNote.content: S: 3yo MN Labrador presented for acute vomiting...
